nasb.text: and all the villages which were around these cities as far as Baalath-beer, Ramah of the Negev. This was the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Simeon according to their families.

esv.text: together with all the villages around these cities as far as Baalath-beer, Ramah of the Negeb. This was the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Simeon according to their clans.

cnv.text: 以及這些城周圍所有的村莊，直到巴拉．比珥，就是南地的拉瑪。這就是西緬支派按著家族所得的產業。

ccb.text: 包括周围所有的村庄，远至巴拉·比珥，即南边的拉玛。这些都是西缅支派按宗族所得的产业。
